reviews.comment:
Un lugar agradable para tomar un café después de cargar nafta

(Translated by Google)
A nice place to have a coffee after filling up with gas
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16076228542632319706/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnaDR2cEFnEAE

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio. Cafetetia siempre práctica para un aperitivo, un almuerzo rápido, o un café. Tiene diarios, WiFi, buena atención . Sólo que el lugar  es algo pequeño y ruidoso por problema de diseño de salón. Pero esta abierto cuando muchos restaurantes y cafeterías están cerrados. Muy conveniente.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. This cafe is always handy for a snack, a quick lunch, or a coffee. It has newspapers, Wi-Fi, and good service. The only problem is that the place is a bit small and noisy due to the design of the dining room. But it's open when many restaurants and cafes are closed. Very convenient.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16076228542632319706/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRNnZmRHN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Bastante incómoda para carga ubicada en el medio de la ciudad, los empleados muy atentos.

(Translated by Google)
Quite inconvenient for cargo located in the middle of the city, but the employees were very attentive.
